overview.description: The iShares 1-3 Year International Treasury Bond ETF (ISHG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of developed market, non-US government issued debts maturing between one to three years. ISHG was launched on Jan 21, 2009 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: FTSE World Government Bond Index - Developed Markets 1-3 Years Capped Select Index
